monitor_the_situation.title: Saudi Arabia Accuses Iran of Attacking Oil Tanker in Hormuz
Pirate Attacks Spike Off Horn of Africa, Likely Houthi-Backed
US Revokes Iran Oil Sanctions Waiver After Strait of Hormuz Attacks

— S3 · Political · Kharg Island, Iran · 2h ago. The US revoked a sanctions waiver allowing Iran to export oil, citing recent tanker attacks in the Strait of Hormuz. Iran has 6 million barrels loaded at Kharg Island.
Detained Gaza Doctor Severely Beaten in Israeli Jail
— S3 · Conflict · Gaza Strip, Palestine · 4h ago. Lawyer says Dr. Hussam Abu Safiya was beaten so severely in Israeli detention he was unrecognizable.
